name: TDD-SUBAGENT-BUG-41
title: Tests refer to deleted dispatch-tdd-subagent.sh in messages despite .py
description: test-parallel-orchestration-scripts.py messages (e.g., t4, t5, t6, t7, t8) say 'dispatch-tdd-subagent.sh' in the ok/ko strings while the actual script is dispatch-tdd-subagent.py. Same pattern in test-skill-invocation-and-rabbit-report-path.py messages ('dispatch-tdd-subagent.sh'). Test logic is correct but log output is stale and misleading. Rename messages to .py for accuracy.
